title: selago lilacina
intro: Selago lilacina, also known as Cape Mistletoe, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and woody stems. Traditionally, Selago lilacina has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selago lilacina is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
